decisions.state_ownership: PM-OWNED tables for merge_request_groups + merge_incidents (deliberate divergence from 7.2 integrator-owned: durable COORDINATION/incident state, not transient EXECUTION state; required by the 'orphaned-inner detectable from PM alone' success criterion). Batch execution state stays integrator-owned.
decisions.land_order: inner-first then outer gitlink in one integrator transaction; inner-push-fail->reject group clean; outer-push-fail-after-inner-land->orphan inner + open incident
decisions.orphaned_inner_recovery: auto-rollforward (next group integration rolls gitlink forward, verify-gated) + human fallback (un-reconcilable orphan -> incident stays open, task comment + dashboard alert)
decisions.verify: against ASSEMBLED multi-repo state (inner@newSHA + outer@(submodule->newSHA)), per-repo verify commands all must pass
decisions.backward_compat: single-repo request (group_id null) = byte-identical to 7.2; groups opt-in
decisions.scope: inner+outer 2-repo gitlink (game_one rynx+outer); general N-repo DAG deferred
decisions.commit_policy: defer to campaign end (project rule: commit when asked); mirrors 7.1/7.2
decisions.campaign_mechanic: design-first (Step 1 doc + its adversarial verify = vision's required 'second review' for this riskiest phase). Fold validated verifier REVISEs into executor brief (APPROVE-with-folded-fix) rather than re-plan loops, as on 7.2 steps 5/6/8/9. Drive plan->verify->execute SEQUENTIALLY (not concurrently - 7.2 step 8 slip).

completed_steps.title: Month 3 design doc
completed_steps.deliverable: docs/design/phase-7.3-design.md (686 lines, 15 sections). The vision's required 'second review' for the riskiest phase.
completed_steps.outcome: APPROVED after 1 revision. Group table merge_request_groups (forming->integrating->landed|rejected|partially_landed); incident table merge_incidents (open->auto_resolved|human_resolved); merge_requests.group_id nullable FK ON DELETE SET NULL. Atomic land inner-first-then-outer; RECONCILABLE = git merge-base --is-ancestor currentGitlink O (verified SOUND); R1 invariant (outer main never advances past unverified assembled tree, even in recovery) proven by construction under lane lock; single lane covers both remotes (lane owner is only pusher of either). Second review caught + fixed TWO design holes: (1) crash-between-pushes orphan detection MUST key off PM open-incident/integrating-group state NOT a git SHA comparison (readSubmoduleGitlink != inner-HEAD is true for any normally-lagging gitlink -> false-positive); incidents opened ONLY synchronously on live push-2 failure, never reconstructed from git; crash window = stranded-group reset+re-integrate (inner re-push = ff no-op). (2) orphaned inner gets distinct member state `orphaned` (NOT landed) via markInnerOrphaned group-land-family op admitted by G1 guard -> grouped outcome set landed|rejected|orphaned. Re-verify APPROVED. BOM stripped (Plan agent has no Write tool, fell back to PowerShell). Judgment calls accepted: no separate 'escalated' incident substate (open + louder surface, Step-12 tactical field); single shared (project,main) lane.

_step2.title: DB schema + migration
_step2.outcome: PM-owned tables added. BLOCKER found+handled: drizzle-kit snapshot chain broken (meta/ stops at 0006, journal+sql go to 0010 - snapshots 0007-0010 never committed). Runtime applies from .sql+journal (fine). HAND-AUTHORED 0011_merge_request_groups.sql + journal entry (idx 11, fixed when epoch) matching 0010 style - the established pattern (0008-0010 also committed snapshot-free). Did NOT run db:generate. group_id + incident.groupId/innerRequestId/taskId all ON DELETE SET NULL (coordination/incident history survives parent delete). idx_merge_incidents_open = plain composite (NOT partial). Member `orphaned` = NO schema change (status is constraint-free text col; flows into Step-3 enum + Step-5 service). 794 server tests green (migration applies on fresh in-memory SQLite = the gate), SET-NULL FK behavior tested, typecheck 6/6.

_step3.title: Shared Zod schemas
_step3.deliverable: merge-group.ts + merge-incident.ts shared schemas+enums; orphaned added to MERGE_REQUEST_STATUSES; 35 new tests.
_step3.outcome: Canonical Zod-3 schemas. Plan corrected roadmap wording: enums live INLINE in schema file (as const + (typeof)[number]) NOT constants/enums.ts; types via schema-file export NOT types/index.ts - matches shipped MERGE_REQUEST_STATUSES convention (both files UNTOUCHED). MERGE_GROUP_STATES (forming default), MERGE_INCIDENT_STATES (open default), MERGE_INCIDENT_TYPES (orphaned_inner), mergeIncidentResolutionSchema (mode auto_rollforward|human + optional outerLandedSha/resolvedByGroupId/note), createMergeGroupSchema (resource default main, memberRequestIds .min(2)=inner+outer). orphaned appended to MERGE_REQUEST_STATUSES. Nullable discipline matches Step-2 DB cols exactly. orphaned ripple = EXACTLY 1 broken test (the .toEqual status array, fixed); server/mcp consumers additive (z.enum-derived) - proven by 794 server + 101 mcp green. 294 shared tests, build clean, typecheck 6/6.

_step4.title: linkedRepos config
_step4.deliverable: linked_repos in canonical project.ts + routes/projects.ts Zod-4 mirror + integrator config.ts + pm-client; 5 tests; openapi regen.
_step4.outcome: Mirrors 7.2 parallelism pattern. KEY convention (design §2 wins): PM-settings JSON snake_case (linked_repos, gitlink_parent/path) + IntegratorConfig camelCase (gitlinkParent) mapped in loadConfig like verify_command->verifyCommand. linkedRepoSchema {name,path,role:enum(inner|outer),gitlink_parent?,gitlink_path?}, .default([])=single-repo unaffected. Cardinality (exactly-one-inner) NOT in Zod - integrator/service concern (design §2.4 N-tolerant data layer). Both Zod schemas (canonical + route mirror) identical shape, no cross-import. reject-bad-role 400 test proves the mirror gates. 294 shared + 797 server + 99 integrator green, openapi regen, typecheck 6/6.

_step5.title: Group service + state machine
_step5.deliverable: merge-group.service.ts (10 fns); attachLandedRef shared helper extracted from land(); 4 MERGE_GROUP_* event names; 36 tests.
_step5.outcome: First PM-side group logic. State machine forming->integrating->landed|rejected|partially_landed + central assertCanTransition (idempotent-noop terminals). THREE verifier pins applied: (D) createGroup ATOMIC claim - WHERE group_id IS NULL AND status=queued + changes===memberIds.length assert inside txn (closes TOCTOU, rolls back on mismatch->409 ALREADY_GROUPED); (C) markIntegrating is SOLE owner of member queued->integrating flip, NO per-member merge.request.integrating event on group pickup (visibility = single merge.group.started), Step-7 route must NOT double-flip; (B) attachLandedRef write-only helper extracted from merge-request.service land() and shared with landGroup (land() byte-identical - 51 merge-request tests green). G1 enforced structurally (landGroup/markInnerOrphaned sole writers of landed/orphaned on grouped members) + assertMemberLandableViaGroup guard (409 GROUPED_MEMBER) for Step-7 per-request land route. markInnerOrphaned: integrating->orphaned, no incident (Step 6), no member_landed event (surfaces via incident). markPartiallyLanded reuses merge.group.rejected w/ outcome discriminator (NOT 5th event). emit-after-commit verified by listener-reads-final-state tests + idempotent-paths-emit-zero. 833 server tests, typecheck 6/6.

_step6.title: Incident service
_step6.deliverable: merge-incident.service.ts (openIncident/getById/list/resolve); merge_incident COMMENT_TYPE; 3 MERGE_INCIDENT_* event names; 21 tests.
_step6.outcome: PM-owned incident model. openIncident inserts row + merge_incident task comment in SAME txn (atomic - the 'detectable from PM alone' surfacing), emit-after-commit. merge_incident registered in COMMENT_TYPES (required - comments Zod validates z.enum(COMMENT_TYPES)) + assertion test. list(state=open,type=orphaned_inner,openedAt asc) = the Step-12 recovery-sweep query, hits idx_merge_incidents_open. resolve authz SPLIT enforced both ways: auto_rollforward=ai_agent-only (human admin 403), human=admin-only (ai_agent 403). open->auto_resolved|human_resolved; same-terminal idempotent-noop; cross-terminal 409. 854 server + 295 shared green, typecheck 6/6. NOTE: transient parallel-load flakiness in unrelated auth/users/export 409-timing tests (didn't recur, not campaign-related).

_step7.title: REST routes + MCP tools
_step7.deliverable: routes/merge-groups.ts (8 endpoints) + merge-incidents.ts (4); G1 guard wired into per-request land route; app.ts mount; 4 worker MCP tools; api-client helpers; openapi regen.
_step7.outcome: PM HTTP+MCP surface complete. Routes mirror merge-requests.ts: LOCAL Zod-4 mirror bodies (only const enum arrays + view TYPES imported from @pm/shared, NOT Zod-3 schema objects). KEY decision (verifier-confirmed): ai_agent gate enforced INSIDE Step-5/6 services, routes pass actorOf(user) - NO inline gate duplication (merge-batches inline gate existed only bc no service). actorOf carries {id,role,type} so resolve human=admin split works. G1: one-line assertMemberLandableViaGroup(id) before requestSvc.land() - no-op for group_id null (non-grouped land BYTE-IDENTICAL), 409 GROUPED_MEMBER for grouped. /merge-requests/{id}/orphan lives in groups router (no collision). 4 worker MCP tools (pm_request_merge_group/get/list_incidents/get_incident); integrator ops HTTP-only. Tests: G1 land-409 + non-grouped-200-stays-green; every integrator op 403s worker; resolve split both directions. 882 server + 106 mcp green, openapi regen, typecheck 6/6.

_step8.title: SSE events for groups + incidents
_step8.deliverable: events.ts wire-frame pass-through (group_id/incident_id/orphaned_sha); 5 SSE test cases. ONE production edit.
_step8.outcome: Emission already wired by Steps 5/6 (services emit groupId/incidentId/orphanedSha on payload.entity) - NO service changes needed. events.ts mirrors 7.2 batch_id pass-through: type-guarded reads + omitted-when-absent spreads. §10.3 scopes flat frame to EXACTLY 3 identifying fields (group_id/incident_id/orphaned_sha) - NOT outcome/inner_repo/etc (dashboard queries the table). group_id on all merge.group.* + merge.incident.* (when non-null groupId); incident_id+orphaned_sha on all merge.incident.*. No FK concern (real PM rows, unlike 7.2 synthetic). Backward-compat: plain frames carry none of the 3 (byte-identical 7.1/7.2). 887 server green, typecheck 6/6. ===PM SIDE COMPLETE (steps 2-8). Steps 9-14 = integrator side (highest risk).===

_step9.title: Multi-repo worktree assembly
_step9.deliverable: git-ops 3 new ops (updateSubmoduleGitlink/readSubmoduleGitlink/materializeSubmoduleWorktree); group-assembly.ts assembleGroup; real two-repo fixture tests.
_step9.outcome: First git submodule/gitlink handling. DESIGN CORRECTED (2nd-review found R1-breaking half-state): §5.2 now 9 steps - step 9 materializeSubmoduleWorktree expands Ri tree into outerWt/<gitlinkPath>/ ON DISK so outer verify sees inner SOURCES (committed gitlink alone = empty working dir = falsely passes/fails verify). fetchFromPath rationale corrected (it's for the working-tree checkout, NOT gitlink-commit resolvability - git allows gitlink->absent-object). win32 plumbing empirically confirmed: updateSubmoduleGitlink = update-index --add --cacheinfo 160000,sha,path (--add required, forward slashes) + commit with EXPLICIT identity (-c user.email/user.name/commit.gpgsign=false - integrator's FIRST authored commit, pool worktrees have no identity). materialize = read-tree --prefix into SEPARATE temp index (GIT_INDEX_FILE) + checkout-index (temp-index isolation load-bearing: real index has the gitlink, same-index read-tree collides). EXECUTOR DEFECT FIX: simple-git .env() is STATEFUL/persists on instance - would leak GIT_INDEX_FILE onto shared worktree git - so spawn git DIRECTLY (runGit) for materialize, env scoped. assembleGroup discriminated union (ok|backpressure|inner_conflict|outer_conflict|gitlink_mismatch). Post-assembly assertion (§11): readSubmoduleGitlink===Ri AND working-tree-populated. Correlated lease deadlock-free (inner-before-outer, release-on-partial-failure). R1-critical working-tree-populated assertion (vendor/rynx/lib.txt on disk) PASSES. 103 integrator green, typecheck 6/6. plan_revisions:1 (the design correction).

_step10.title: Group integration + assembled verify
_step10.deliverable: group-integration.ts runGroupIntegration; pm-client 4 group methods; batch.ts runGroupLaneOnce dispatch; index.ts per-repo lanes; 10 tests.
_step10.outcome: Group = ATOMIC unit. assembleGroup + concurrent inner+outer runVerify (Promise.all) + AND combine (pass iff BOTH exitCode0 && !timedOut). Scheduler recognizes forming group on lane -> runGroupLaneOnce (lane-lock once) -> runGroupIntegration; empty linkedRepos -> unchanged runBatchOnce (7.2 backward compat). FOUR verifier fixes: (1) role mapping CONFIG-DECLARED (linkedRepos[].role) + member->repo bind by commitSha-preferred ref-existence, FAIL-LOUD on ambiguous (both/neither) - NO silent guess; (2) pre-pickup failure (ambiguous bind OR assembly conflict/mismatch) rejects from FORMING (no markGroupIntegrating, legal §3.3), post-pickup verify-fail from INTEGRATING; (3) rejection surfaced exactly once via rejectGroup reason (rejectGroup rejects all members atomically + emits MERGE_GROUP_REJECTED w/ reason; NO per-member rejectMergeRequest = no double-reject); (4) all-pass keeps worktrees leased + attempts open for Step 11 (ready_to_land seam), test releases to avoid leak. EXECUTOR BUG FIX: bare `git rev-parse <40-hex>` echoes any sha back without existence check (defeats commitSha-uniqueness) -> use rev-parse --verify <ref>^{commit}. startAttempt: inner base=Mi, outer base=Mo. innerVerifyCmd/outerVerifyCmd = member.verifyCmd ?? default (linkedRepos has no per-repo verifyCommand). Step-10/11 seam: ready_to_land returns AssembledGroupOk+Ri/Ro+open attempt ids. 113 integrator green, typecheck 6/6.

_step11.title: Atomic land + orphan detection
_step11.deliverable: group-land.ts landAssembledGroup (§6 protocol); pm-client 4 methods (landGroup/markInnerOrphaned/markPartiallyLanded/openIncident); batch.ts runGroupLaneOnce rewire; 4 induced-failure tests.
_step11.outcome: HEART OF PHASE - half-landed-gitlink case handled. §6.1 drift guard (live inner main===Mi AND outer===Mo before PUSH, else reject clean no incident) -> §6.2 PUSH1 inner (Mi->Ri) -> failure-pt-(a) reject whole group clean (outer NEVER touched) -> PUSH2 outer (Mo->Ro,gitlink->Ri) -> §6.7 clean land (completeAttempt passed Ri/Ro BEFORE landGroup) OR §6.5 ORPHAN. EXACT orphan order: completeAttempt(inner,passed,Ri)->markInnerOrphaned(innerReq,Ri)->openIncident(orphaned_inner,Ri)->completeAttempt(outer,failed)->rejectMergeRequest(outerReq)->markPartiallyLanded(group,incidentId). VERIFIER resolved the key hole: rejectMergeRequest does NOT 409 a grouped member (G1 guard is on LAND route only). FOUR pinned constraints: (A) R1 - NO 2nd outer drift recheck between pushes; FF HEAD:branch push REJECTS non-ff->orphan(safe) = the backstop; failed push leaves remote ref unchanged (atomic per-ref) so outer NEVER half-advances; (B) outer reject = plain rejectMergeRequest; (C) completeAttempts BEFORE landGroup (landGroup doesn't touch attempts, no double-complete); (D) worktree release ONCE in try/finally, batch.ts placeholder release REMOVED. Test (c) THE heart-of-phase test: inner bare main->Ri, outer bare main NOT advanced, exact §6.5 order, incident durable. push-reason->RejectCategory structural map (categorize is verify-only). 117 integrator green, typecheck 6/6.

_step12.title: Orphaned-inner recovery
_step12.deliverable: group-recovery.ts recoverOrphanedInner (§7 state machine); git-ops isAncestor; pm-client listMergeIncidents+resolveIncident; batch.ts recovery wiring; 6+1 tests.
_step12.outcome: Proof-level §7 auto-rollforward + human-fallback. MANDATORY R1-CRITICAL FIX (verifier EMPIRICALLY ran merge-base --is-ancestor through installed simple-git@3.36.0): git.raw RESOLVES (doesn't throw) on exit-1-empty-stderr -> a git.raw isAncestor returning true-on-resolve would classify NOT-ancestor (regressing) gitlink as RECONCILABLE and auto-push it = R1 BREAK; GitError has no numeric exitCode this version. FIX: isAncestor = DIRECT git spawn (runIsAncestor, mirrors Step-9 runGit precedent) reading close code 0->true/1->false/else->REJECT. RECONCILABLE=isAncestor(currentGitlink,O) in INNER repo (currentGitlink=ancestor arg). Detection PM-KEYED (listMergeIncidents state=open type=orphaned_inner, oldest-first) NEVER git-reconstructed (test f: git-looks-orphan-but-no-incident->nothing). §7.3 6-step rollforward: lease outer+inner, reconcilable check, fetchFromPath(O)+updateSubmoduleGitlink+materialize+post-assert, VERIFY (R1 gate), drift-recheck+FF push, resolveIncident(auto_rollforward,outerLandedSha,resolvedByGroupId). Escalate (un-reconcilable/verify-fail/auth-push-fail) = incident stays open + logger.warn(escalation), NO push/resolve. Defer (non_ff/drift/backpressure) = retry next tick. R1: outer byte-identical on every escalate/defer; auto-resolve advances ONLY to verified gitlink->O. Worktree release once in try/finally. Scheduler: runGroupLaneOnce lists groups AND open incidents, no_group+no_incident=lock-free fast path; else ONE lock, recovery FIRST then integration; recovered outcome variant. 122 passed/1 skip/1 fail (the 1 fail = PRE-EXISTING flaky 7.2 batch-e2e wall-clock overlap, passes isolated, CPU-contention, NOT a regression, NO group/recovery - flag for Step-13 de-flake). typecheck 6/6.

_step13.title: Full-stack E2E + chaos
_step13.deliverable: group-e2e.test.ts (6 flows: a/b/c/d + chaos-1/chaos-2); MISSING reclaimStrandedGroups built (resetGroup transition+route+pm-client+integrator reclaim); chaos.ts fault hooks; ungrouped filter; batch-e2e de-flake.
_step13.outcome: REGRESSION NET + completed a §6.4/§9-finding-2 deliverable earlier steps LEFT AS A GAP. PREREQUISITE built: stranded-GROUP recovery (design assigned to Step 12 but Step 12 only did §7 orphan recovery). resetGroup (integrating->forming, atomic group+members reset; CORRUPTION FENCE: 409 if open orphaned_inner incident OR terminal/partial state - a partially_landed group is a REAL orphan for §7 NOT a stranded group). reclaimStrandedGroups at startup: integrating group + no incident -> resetGroup (§6.4 window); incident present -> leave for §7. PLAN DEFECT FIXED: single-repo runBatchOnce was admitting grouped members -> 409 createGroup; added `ungrouped` filter (§9 finding 3) to list - grouped members never speculatively interleaved. Chaos hooks (chaos.ts, gated test-only, byte-identical prod): PM_CHAOS_CRASH_AT=after_inner_push (§6.4 window) / mid_assembly; PM_CHAOS_FAIL_OUTER_PUSH=once (deterministic orphan). E2E spawns real integrator vs in-process PM + real inner+outer gitlink remotes. 6 flows pass: (a) clean atomic land both remotes+gitlink@Ri; (b) verify-fail reject neither advances; (c) orphan PM-visible (inner landed/outer NOT/partially_landed) -> 2nd group -> auto_rollforward -> gitlink@Ri auto_resolved; (d) un-reconcilable -> escalate stays OPEN outer byte-identical; (chaos-1 §6.4 THE load-bearing) crash-between-pushes -> reclaimStrandedGroups -> clean atomic land NO half-landed gitlink ever (gitlink only pre-orphan or Ri); (chaos-2) mid-assembly crash -> forming -> clean land zero side-effects. De-flake 7.2 batch-e2e: wider verify window + overlap||subLinear tolerant assertion. 894 server + 134 integrator/1 skip, FULL MONOREPO pnpm test green (9 tasks), typecheck 6/6, openapi regen. Deterministic chaos (env-gated process.exit at transition, NOT timing). plan_revisions:0 but folded the missing reclaim + the ungrouped race fix.

_step14.title: Documentation
_step14.deliverable: integrator-deployment.md §14 cross-repo + linked_repos + game_one layout; design §16 deviations + Shipped status; CLAUDE.md 7.3 para; integrator README linked_repos + group code-map; vision marked shipped.
_step14.outcome: Docs-only, cross-checked vs shipped source: linked_repos, merge_request_groups/merge_incidents/group_id, merge.group.*/merge.incident.* event names, /merge-groups + /merge-incidents + /orphan + /reset endpoints, reclaimStrandedGroups/resetGroup/RECONCILABLE/isAncestor/auto_rollforward/orphaned_inner/partially_landed/ungrouped - all verified. §16 documents 7 deviations (working-tree materialization fix, isAncestor direct-spawn, config-declared+commitSha role binding, reclaimStrandedGroups late-landing, ungrouped filter, group-land vs per-member-reject, chaos hooks). No code contradiction. typecheck 6/6, 894 server tests green.

final_gate.tests: 1429 passed / 1 skipped (295 shared + 106 mcp + 894 server + 134 integrator-ref/1 skip)
final_gate.lint: integrator-ref clean (campaign-heavy pkg); ~pre-existing server baseline unchanged (untouched files)
final_gate.commit_note: Left dirty for human review per project CLAUDE.md 'commit only when asked'. The whole Phase 7.3 surface is uncommitted on top of the 7.2 branch.

open_issues: Pre-existing server lint baseline in untouched files (predates 7.3).
7.2 batch-e2e wall-clock overlap assertion de-flaked in Step 13 (wider window + overlap||subLinear).
Vision Risk #3: orphaned-inner recovery state machine needs proof-level care - Step 1 design doc + adversarial verify is the load-bearing 'second review'.
Forward dep: 7.4 dashboard consumes merge.group.* + merge.incident.* events (PM tables exist here, unlike 7.2 batch state).

Recurring hazards: Zod3/4 (LOCAL Zod-4 mirror in server routes); win32 test cmds (ping -n N, never bare sleep); integrator-ref fileParallelism:false; completeAttempt(attemptId); ~59 pre-existing server lint baseline.
